message:
fix(codegen): Refine catch block semicolon detection

Improved catch suffix detection to only treat expressions that END with
a catch block as needing semicolons, not expressions that merely contain
a catch block somewhere inside.

Detection logic:
- 'catch {}' at end → add semicolon
- 'catch |err| { ... }' at end → add semicolon (using brace depth counting)
- '{ ... catch |err| ... }' → NO semicolon (block statement, catch is inside)

Result:
- test_bz2: Now compiles successfully (moves to runtime failure)
- test_binop: Still has value discard issue (separate problem)
